test-case.description: Does not throw while running Script Analyzer
test-case.name: PSScriptAnalyzer.Does not throw while running Script Analyzer

failure.message: Expected $null or empty, but got @('Problem in Invoke-Monkey365.ps1 at line 423 with message: Line has trailing whitespace', 'Problem in New-HorizontalNavBar.ps1 at line 91 with message: The Variable 'input' is an automatic variable that is built into PowerShell, assigning to it might have undesired side effects. If assignment is not by design, please use a different name.', 'Problem in New-HorizontalNavBar.ps1 at line 91 with message: The Variable 'input' is an automatic variable that is built into PowerShell, assigning to it might have undesired side effects. If assignment is not by design, please use a different name.').
failure.stack-trace: at $Script:ScriptAnalyzer.Results | Foreach-Object {"Problem in $($_.ScriptName) at line $($_.Line) with message: $($_.Message)" } |Should -BeNullOrEmpty, C:\azuredevops\dev\monkey365\pipelines\scriptanalyzer\container\PSSA.tests.ps1:29 at <ScriptBlock>, C:\azuredevops\dev\monkey365\pipelines\scriptanalyzer\container\PSSA.tests.ps1:29
